Title: Context manager not saving slots
Root Cause: Async function not awaited in chain
Fix Description: Made context_manager methods async and awaited all calls
User Impact: Users completing onboarding but 0/11 slots saved

Title: Frontend crash on empty requirements
Root Cause: TypeScript optional chaining missing
Fix Description: Added ?. operator to prevent accessing properties of undefined
User Impact: Frontend crashed when backend returned empty requirements

Title: Session ID type mismatch
Root Cause: String vs int type confusion in session ID handling
Fix Description: Added explicit string conversion for session IDs
User Impact: Session lookups failed intermittently

Title: Supabase persistence silently failing
Root Cause: Missing error handling on failed Supabase writes
Fix Description: Added try-catch with detailed logging for Supabase operations
User Impact: Slots saved to cache but not persisted to database

Title: Slot status filter logic inverted
Root Cause: Filter logic checking for 'unfilled' instead of 'filled'
Fix Description: Changed filter from unfilled to filled in _extract_slots_from_turn
User Impact: Filled slots were being excluded from extraction

Title: Extraction confidence threshold too low
Root Cause: No confidence threshold filter in extraction
Fix Description: Added 0.6 confidence threshold to filter low-quality extractions
User Impact: Low-confidence extractions polluting slot data

Title: Duplicate slot persistence
Root Cause: Slots persisted on every turn instead of only on new fills
Fix Description: Changed to persist only newly filled slots (status transition)
User Impact: Unnecessary database writes on every message

Title: Event loop conflict in async chain
Root Cause: Non-async function calling async adapter, breaking event loop
Fix Description: Made _persist_slots_to_supabase and add_turn async with proper await chain
User Impact: Supabase persistence silently failed due to broken async chain

Title: DynamoDB serialization exception
Root Cause: Offerings/requirements as lists instead of strings
Fix Description: Enhanced string conversion to properly join list items with semicolons
User Impact: Persona generation crashed when writing to DynamoDB

Title: List-to-string conversion missing
Root Cause: LLM returning lists for offerings/requirements instead of strings
Fix Description: Added 4-layer defense with list-to-string conversion
User Impact: AttributeError: 'list' object has no attribute 'strip' crashed embedding generation

Title: Empty raw_questions in DynamoDB
Root Cause: Pre-fix users completed onboarding before Bug #1-7 fixes deployed
Fix Description: Created backfill script to replay conversations and regenerate personas
User Impact: Legacy user has 0/11 slots - persona generation fails with 'No data provided'

Title: LLM wrapping JSON in markdown
Root Cause: Claude Haiku wraps JSON in explanatory markdown text ~50% of time
Fix Description: Created RobustJsonOutputParser with regex extraction fallback
User Impact: Persona generation failed with 'Invalid json output' error (67% of failures)

Title: Slot extraction returning conversational text
Root Cause: System prompt has 258 lines of conversational instructions overwhelming 15 lines of JSON requirements
Fix Description: Added critical JSON enforcement section at end of prompt + simplified retry prompt
User Impact: Onboarding conversation failed with 'No JSON object found in LLM response' - LLM returned pure conversational text

Title: Match score inconsistency across pages
Root Cause: Dashboard defaulted to 50% when no matches exist; Discover used keyword algorithm showing ~65%
Fix Description: Removed COALESCE(score 50) default and return 0 when total_matches = 0
User Impact: Dashboard showed 50% average when user had 0 matches; Discover showed flat 65% scores; Matches page showed 7%

Title: Profile review modal inconsistency
Root Cause: Modal depends on isComplete flag timing; race condition between backend response and modal trigger
Fix Description: Modal shows when isComplete && !summaryConfirmed && !completionLocked, but timing varies per user
User Impact: Modal appeared for Emma/Grace but not Frank/David/Ayesha/Carol

Title: Welcome message streaming regression
Root Cause: First AI message (welcome greeting) was marked as isLatest and typewritten slowly
Fix Description: Added messageIndex prop and skip typewriter for first AI message (index 0)
User Impact: Grace's session: Welcome took 5 seconds to stream vs instant for Bob/David

Title: Duplicate slot persistence causing 409 errors
Root Cause: POST without upsert header causes duplicate key constraint errors when slots are re-extracted
Fix Description: Added Prefer: resolution=merge-duplicates header to enable upsert behavior
User Impact: 409 Conflict: Key (user_id slot_name) already exists when AI re-extracts filled slots

Title: Silent persistence failures causing data loss
Root Cause: save_slots_batch returned 0 without raising exceptions; network errors timeout 500 errors caused silent data loss; users completed onboarding with 0 slots in database
Fix Description: Implemented 3-layer defense: (1) Fail fast - raise SupabasePersistenceError instead of returning 0 (2) Retry - @retry decorator with 3 attempts exponential backoff (3) Validation - read back from database to verify persistence
User Impact: Users completing onboarding thinking it worked but 0/11 slots persisted - complete data loss

Title: Completion threshold too low causing premature completion
Root Cause: 80% threshold allowed completion after 1 comprehensive answer (9/11 slots = 82%); poor UX and incomplete profiles
Fix Description: Raised threshold from 80% to 100% + added minimum 3 user turns requirement
User Impact: User completed onboarding after 1 answer reaching 80% progress; expected conversation but got instant completion

Title: Persona fields causing DynamoDB serialization errors
Root Cause: LLM returns non-string types (lists dicts numbers) for persona fields which DynamoDB can't serialize
Fix Description: Added ensure_string() helper to sanitize all persona fields before DynamoDB write (lists→semicolons dicts→key:value pairs)
User Impact: Persona generation failed with SerializationException when LLM returned non-string values

Title: No fallback to Supabase when session expires from memory
Root Cause: complete_onboarding() only reads from in-memory context_manager; if AI service restarts or session expires slots in Supabase are inaccessible
Fix Description: Added fallback to fetch slots from Supabase using get_user_slots() when in-memory session not found or empty
User Impact: If AI service restarts between onboarding and completion user would have to redo entire onboarding despite Supabase having all data

Title: AttributeError in completion check causing 500 errors
Root Cause: BUG-023 fix used wrong attribute name - context.conversation_history instead of context.turns
Fix Description: Changed context.conversation_history to context.turns in is_auto_complete() method
User Impact: All onboarding chat messages failed with 500 error - 'ConversationContext' object has no attribute 'conversation_history'

Title: LLM returning preamble text instead of JSON in persona generation
Root Cause: Claude Haiku outputs descriptive text like 'Based on the provided...' instead of pure JSON causing parse failures
Fix Description: Added stricter prompt instructions + code block extraction + fallback persona generation when no JSON found
User Impact: Persona generation failed with 'Invalid json output' - LLM described what it would generate instead of outputting JSON

Title: Supabase upsert still causing 409 duplicate key errors
Root Cause: Original BUG-022 fix added Prefer header but PostgREST requires on_conflict query parameter to enable upsert
Fix Description: Added ?on_conflict=user_id slot_name to save_slot() and save_slots() URLs
User Impact: Supabase save failed with 409 Conflict - duplicate key violation on re-extraction of existing slot
